name: dlp-tracker-monorepo
description: Monorepo containing frontend and backend for DLP Tracker

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
